nasb.text: If there is a man who lies with a male as those who lie with a woman, both of them have committed a detestable act; they shall surely be put to death. Their bloodguiltiness is upon them.

esv.text: If a man lies with a male as with a woman, both of them have committed an abomination; they shall surely be put to death; their blood is upon them.

cnv.text: 如果有人與男人同睡，像與女人同睡一樣，他們二人行了可憎的事，必要把他們處死，他們必須承擔流血的罪責。

ccb.text: 如果男人与男人同寝，好像男人与女人同寝一样，他们的行为可憎，必须被处死。他们要承担自己的罪。
